title: leea sambucina var. sumatrana
intro: Leea sambucina var. sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran leeae, is a variety of Leeae plant species native to the tropical regions of Sumatra in Indonesia, belonging to the Leeaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leeae include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to reduce stress. Leeae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
